_meta.source: Fort Lauderdale Police Department News Releases — Mock Fixture
_meta.description: Sample news release data matching FLPD press release format. Used for local testing only.

releases.title: ARREST — Narcotics
releases.summary: Fort Lauderdale Police Department detectives arrested a Fort Lauderdale man on narcotics charges following a traffic stop in the 1600 block of Broward Boulevard. The suspect was found in possession of cocaine and cash consistent with narcotics sales.
charges: Possession of cocaine with intent to sell (F2)

releases.title: ARREST — Theft/Burglary
releases.summary: A Fort Lauderdale woman was arrested after FLPD officers responded to a retail theft call at a business on Andrews Avenue. The suspect was identified via surveillance footage.

releases.title: ARREST — Weapons
releases.summary: FLPD officers arrested a Pompano Beach man during a traffic stop in Fort Lauderdale after detecting a concealed firearm. The subject was found to have a prior felony conviction.
charges: Felon in possession of a firearm (F2)
Carrying a concealed firearm without a license (F3)
